name: n6-lsp
description: Wire the `n6-lsp` server (NEXUS-6 knowledge-atlas grammar LSP — diagnostics + hover, re-validated on every edit) for `.n6` files in Claude Code. LSP config carried in plugin-root `.lsp.json` (the canonical Claude Code LSP filename — dot-prefixed; auto-discovered, no manifest field needed). Requires `n6-lsp` on PATH (install via `hx install dancinlab/n6`); if absent, Claude Code surfaces the error in /plugin Errors.
